_doc: Machine-readable PARBAUGHS brand spec. ALWAYS concatenated into any design-gen prompt preamble (with BRAND-BRIEF.md). The cure for off-brand 'slop': the model reverts to a generic prior without a locked, explicit spec. Verified palette from src/styles/base.css :root (Clubhouse default) 2026-06-15.
app: PARBAUGHS — invite-only golf-league PWA; country-club-meets-group-chat; community over competition.
brand_recipe: Authentic 1930s rubber-hose (Cuphead-era) cartoon CHARACTER, FINISHED with Holderness&Bourne tour-grade polish. Rubber-hose LEADS; brass/H&B is the premium FRAME around it. NOT two competing looks — one family, two registers (P+rose = formal mark; rubber-hose = voice/character). Like Malbon: unmistakably playful AND premium.
palette_forbidden: yellow-gold or shiny 'medal' gold gradients (use ANTIQUE brass #B4893E, restrained)
cold pure grey as a primary
rubber_hose_hallmarks: warm limited palette on off-white/cream AGED PAPER ground

tour_HnB.use_for: premium presentation, on-course/competitive, the polish frame, cosmetic ITEMS (brass plate/enamel/leather)
tour_HnB.colorway: tournament white, tour navy, charcoal/grey + antique brass; what pros wear competing
tour_HnB.feel: understated prep-luxury, fine materials, restrained brass hardware, hand-enamel, fine leather

leisure_rubberhose.use_for: caddies, seasonal decorations, onboarding character art, casual/leisure merch, playful moments

marks_and_motifs.primary_mark: P+rose — a P with a white rose climbing through it (MAY be re-styled rubber-hose per Founder 2026-06-15)

prohibitions: default-centered symmetric composition with no focal peak
photoreal where cartoon is expected (and vice-versa)
any text/letters in generated art unless explicitly requested
a generic heraldic crest with a crown + Roman laurel (the rejected 2026-06-15 'Olympic medal' miss)
global_negative: no generic stock cartoon, no neon, no HDR, no drop-shadow clipart, no anime, no modern flat-vector, no 3D Pixar render, no Olympic-medal gold, no default-centered comp, no crown+Roman-laurel crest, no text/letters
semantic_anchor: warm limited Parbaughs palette, off-white aged-paper ground, subtle halftone/grain, confident black ink outline weight, soft vintage-print lighting, one asymmetric focal peak, a PARBAUGHS motif present (rose / crossed hickories / claret pennant)
qc_5point: Would it read as PARBAUGHS even WITHOUT the logo? (must be YES)
Palette: only the approved hexes + antique brass (no yellow-gold/neon/pure-white)?
Correct LANE (rubber-hose vs tour/H&B) for the surface?
A real PARBAUGHS motif present (not generic luxury)?
Black ink weight + aged-paper ground + restraint (not slop tells)?

recraft_style_ids._note: Populate after building locked Recraft Custom Styles per lane (from the body-of-work set).
